name: VuePress
description: VuePress — Vue-powered static site generator built for writing technical documentation, with Markdown-centric authoring and built-in search.

seo.title: VuePress — Developer Documentation / DevRel
seo.meta_description: VuePress: VuePress — Vue-powered static site generator built for writing technical documentation, with Markdown-centric authoring and built-in search.

when_to_use: Vue-powered documentation site authored entirely in Markdown
Component library docs site built with VuePress default theme
Built-in full-text search enabled without external service
Custom theme extending VuePress for branded dev portal
Documentation PR previewed via VuePress static build on Netlify

pros: Good Markdown authoring with code-focused defaults
Simple for Vue teams to extend with components
Free, open source, and easy to self-host
cons: Community has largely shifted to VitePress
Slower build times than modern alternatives
Development pace has slowed versus peers
Best for Vue teams - awkward fit elsewhere
review.verdict: Workable but clearly succeeded by VitePress; new projects should start with VitePress or Starlight instead.
review.best_for: Existing VuePress sites or teams committed to the legacy Vue 2 documentation ecosystem.
review.not_for: New projects - choose VitePress, Starlight, or Nextra for better performance and momentum.
